description.value:
Archetype

Your predatory nature radiates outward as a palpable aura of dominance. You gain the following permanent benefits while your Devil Fruit is not suppressed:

  • Enemies within 30 feet take a –1 status penalty to Will saves.
  • While you are in Hybrid Form or Full Wolf Form, your Strikes deal additional damage equal to the target's current Frightened value (e.g., Frightened 3 = +3 damage).
  • When a creature critically fails a save against one of your fear abilities (Savage Howl, Howl of Dread), it is also Sickened 1 from pure terror.
description.gm: The Will save penalty aura is a strong persistent debuff — it applies even in human form, making the character a natural battlefield controller. The Frightened-damage scaling rewards setting up fear conditions with Savage Howl before attacking.
